messages.content: Hey Ajit! 👋 I see you're in your Cycy-Clone project directory. How's the goingupdate project coming along? Anything specific you'd like help with today?

I'm Cycy, your personal AI assistant! I'm here to help you with your Cycy-Clone project in the goingupdate directory. You created me, so I'm essentially your own AI assistant clone that you're working on.

I remember you're working on this project at /Users/ajitprajapati/Projects/Cycy-Clone/goingupdate. What would you like to work on today?
